{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Incarnation of Naraka
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Incarnation of Naraka]] is heading to [[Myria]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“Even now, the Incarnation of Naraka is on his way to Myria.”<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
